settings.title: Neelibhringadi Keram
settings.subtitle: One oil for complete hair recovery
settings.body: Hair recovery needs two wins - reduce the fall and support new growth. Most oils address one. Neelibhringadi works both sides.

settings.label: FIRST APPLICATION
settings.title: Scalp cools immediately
settings.body: The Neeli acts immediately. Oil absorbs without heaviness.

settings.label: ~ 8 USES
settings.title: Less in the shower
settings.body: Fall reduction is the first signal. The follicle is strengthening.

settings.label: ~ 36 USES
settings.title: Continued improvement - visible change
settings.body: Three months completes a cycle. Visible density increase at the crown.

settings.heading: The honest sequence.
settings.text: Root strength comes before visible density.
settings.footnote: Based on consistent use as directed. Individual results may vary.

settings.title: 100% NATURAL INGREDIENTS
settings.text: No mineral oil, parabens, or synthetic fragrance. Pure botanical extraction.

settings.title: TRIPLE-MILK AND SESAME OIL BASE
settings.text: Traditional carrier that mimics scalp lipids. Deeply penetrative.

settings.title: NO PARABENS
settings.text: Natural antioxidants help preserve the formula.

settings.title: NO ARTIFICIAL FRAGRANCE
settings.text: The scent comes from herbs and carrier oils.

settings.title: INGREDIENTS
settings.text: Neeli, Bhringaraj, Amla, traditional carrier oils, and a triple-milk base selected to cool, fortify, and support regrowth.

settings.title: PROCESSING
settings.text: Each batch is prepared over several days so the herbal essence fully binds to the oil instead of sitting on the surface.

settings.title: RESULT TIMELINE
settings.text: The first win is usually less fall. Visible density comes later with consistent use and a complete growth cycle.

settings.title: SIDE EFFECTS
settings.text: This is a botanical product, but patch testing first is still the safest place to start for sensitive scalps.

settings.name: Priya M.
settings.quote: Less hair in the shower drain by week three. That was the first sign it was working. The routine is simple enough to actually stick with.

settings.name: Arjun V.
settings.quote: New growth visible at the temples after three months. Consistent use was the key. It's a recovery system, not a quick fix.

settings.kicker: What's in it. What is not.
settings.heading: The formula, simplified.
settings.text: Two clear columns make the formula easier to scan and trust.

settings.title: Bringaraj
settings.text: Supports hair growth. Activates follicles and increases scalp circulation.

settings.title: Amla
settings.text: Minimizes hair fall. Strengthens the hair shaft with natural Vitamin C.

settings.title: Neeli
settings.text: Cools and recovers. Reduces scalp inflammation and promotes regrowth.

settings.title: Coconut oil
settings.text: Deep nourishment. Traditional carrier that mimics natural scalp lipids.

settings.title: Coconut milk
settings.text: Nourishes and moisturizes the scalp.

settings.title: Goat milk
settings.text: Addresses dandruff and improves hair texture.

settings.title: Cow milk
settings.text: Supports hair fall control and growth.

settings.title: WARM
settings.text: Warm oil penetrates - cold oil sits on the surface.

settings.title: APPLY
settings.text: Apply adequate amount gently onto the scalp and hair

settings.title: MASSAGE
settings.text: Circular motion, 5 minutes. Fingertips, not nails.

settings.heading: KEY INGREDIENTS
settings.text: Four ingredients to explain the core formula.
settings.milk_text: Three nourishing milks work together for a healthier scalp and stronger hair.

settings.title: Full ingredient list
settings.text: Neeli, Bringaraj, Amla, sesame oil, coconut milk, goat milk, cow milk, and traditionally processed Ayurvedic botanicals.

settings.title: Preparation - 7 days
settings.text: The formulation is processed patiently so the actives infuse into the oil instead of separating into layers.

settings.title: Safety & interactions
settings.text: Patch test first. Stop use if irritation occurs, and consult your doctor if you are pregnant or managing a scalp condition.

settings.title: Frequently asked
settings.text: Use two to three times a week, massage gently, and give the routine enough time to move from reduced fall into visible density.

settings.question: When will I see results?
settings.answer: Reduced hair fall is typically noticed within 2 to 3 weeks.

settings.question: Does it help with greying?
settings.answer: Neeli and Bhringaraja are traditionally used to support natural hair colour.

settings.question: Can I use it on coloured hair?
settings.answer: Yes. The formula is gentle, but extended use may slightly darken hair over time.

settings.question: Is it safe during pregnancy?
settings.answer: As with any new topical regimen during pregnancy or nursing, consult your doctor first.

settings.heading: Go deeper.
settings.text: Clear answers for the most common questions.
